memories.content: User has children who are the most important thing in their life.
User regularly plays PlayStation Fortnite, basketball, and watches movies with their kids.
User has 4 kids
User then moved to Ashland Street where the family rented a house
User's first house is at 102 Main Street, Alstonville, which is their family house
User has four children: Isla (17), Ashton (15), Luella (12), and Mala (11).
User currently does not care for their children full-time due to mental health issues, but their mental health is improving.
User hopes to care for their children 50% of the time in the future.
User spends time with their kids, especially Iyla and Luella.
User wants to transfer their memory to help write a book for their kids, grandchildren, and great-grandchildren.
User's first overseas trip was a family trip to Bali with parents (mum, dad) and siblings (Ken and Allison).
User went to Fiji again with family in 2015.
User was a Family Physician (FP) from April 2007 until December 2023.
User has children who are proud of their achievements.
Ashton has been diagnosed with ADHD.
User likes spending time with all their kids.
User refers to the life story as 'my Story' and prefers it saved in JSON format for future reference.
Luella is referred to as my favourite Alien due to her uniqueness.
Ashton is the user's favorite son.
User values personal boundaries in friendships.
Iyla is 17 years old and in Grade 12
Ashton is 15 years old and in Grade 10
Luella is 13 years old and will be graduating Grade 8 in June
Mehlia is 11 years old and in Grade 6
User has equipped the assistant with a memory feature to maintain a life story JSON file.
User has three siblings: David, a half brother 17 years older; Ken, a full brother 7 years older; and Allison, a sister 4 years older.
Lyndal Harris is your support person who helps you with life admin
Ashton has just started playing basketball and has had a couple of girlfriends and one kiss.
Luella is turning 13 on June 13 this year and has been players player in netball year on year.
Luella plays Centre in netball and is considered an awesome player.
Mala looks up to her older sister Luella and is bigger in size than her.
Started with ANZ as a personal banker in December 2006
Iyla is very smart and an A student.
Iyla owns her own car.
Iyla's best friends are Emma and Sienna.
Iyla is in year 12 at Albany Creek State High.
Iyla's boyfriend is Connor.
Ashton is in grade 10 at Albany Creek State High (ACSH).
Ashton is highly intelligent and receives A's at school.
Ashton has started going to the gym and is getting fit.
Luella is in grade 8 at ACSH.
Luella's friends are Sophie and Mikala.
The user is extremely close to Luella.
Luella plays Fortnite with the user.
Luella is a superstar at Netball.
Luella has received best and fairest for her netball team ACE 4 out of the last 5 years.
Luella plays the position of centre in netball.
Luella helps the user by washing and folding laundry.
Luella is described as having a very kind heart.
Mehlia is the youngest and wildest child of the user.
Mehlia has ADHD.
Mehlia is in grade 6 at All Saints Primary Albany Creek.
Mehlia loves her mother very much.
Mehlia plays Netball and is a great player.
Mehlia plays for ACE.
Mehlia likes to ride her scooter with her friends.
